rationale: Art. VIII §23 governs statewide appraisal prohibition and enforcement of appraisal standards. It does not address homestead exemption amounts, which are authorized under art. VIII §1-b. No conflict.
quote: There shall be no statewide appraisal of real property for ad valorem tax purposes
_note: No conflict. Homestead exemption authority derives from Tex. Const. art. VIII, §1-b, not §23.
